patch.value: Support public changelog labels or issue links for generated pm item references

Duplicate check: searched all statuses for public issue link neutral tracker label item-url-base generated changelog and internal tracker paths public changelog. Existing closed lineage pmc-w906/pmc-f4yg/pmc-ew5n added --item-url-base and exposed it through the pm changelog extension, but no item covers a generated public-doc mode that can render GitHub issue links or neutral tracker labels instead of .agents/pm blob URLs.\n\nContext: pm-cli PR #479 CodeRabbit flagged generated CHANGELOG.md entries linking to https://github.com/unbraind/pm-cli/blob/main/.agents/pm/... as public-doc leakage. Hand-editing pm-cli CHANGELOG.md to #467 broke its mandatory pnpm changelog:pm:check gate because pm-changelog currently regenerates links from --item-url-base. Add an upstream option/format policy so consumers can keep package-owned generated changelogs while choosing public issue/PR references or neutral labels for pm item IDs.

value.author: claude-opus
value.text: Implemented --item-ref-style {auto|label|toon|github} (branch feat/item-ref-style-public-refs). formatItemId now switches on the style: 'label' = neutral (id) never a link (public-doc safe); 'toon' = force .toon blob link (falls back to label without --item-url-base); 'github' = public GitHub issue/PR link derived from the item's gh:owner/repo#N provenance tag (as written by pm-github), falling back to a label when absent/malformed; 'auto' (default) reproduces prior behavior byte-for-byte. CLI + both extension subcommands validate the value with a structured error. 5 generator tests + README docs added; 154/154 tests + changelog:check green.

patch.value: Added ChangelogItemRefStyle option + CLI flag --item-ref-style, wired through cli.ts and both extension subcommands, rewrote formatItemId as a style switch with a gh:owner/repo#N provenance-tag parser, 5 generator tests, and README docs.
Consumers can render pm item references as neutral labels or public GitHub issue/PR links instead of internal .agents/pm .toon blob URLs, without changing default (auto) output.

github mode emits ([#467](https://github.com/unbraind/pm-changelog/issues/467)); label mode emits (id) with zero .agents/pm leakage; auto default is byte-for-byte identical (changelog:check green); 154/154 tests pass.
